message:
test(core): add property-based tests for adaptive budget allocator (ft-2p9cb.1.4.3)

14 new proptests for A4 allocator invariants:
- Conservation: sum of lane budgets stays constant across epochs
- Floor/ceiling: no lane drops below min or exceeds max budget %
- Deterministic replay: same inputs → same allocations
- Reset restores exact defaults
- Warmup produces no adjustments
- Serde roundtrips for all new types
- Adjusted budgets maintain monotonic percentile ordering

182 unit + 81 property = 263 total tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
